data.title: Hitek Global Inc. Announces Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Reported from Xiamen, China on April 24, 2026, Hitek Global Inc. (Nasdaq: HKIT), a leading information technology consulting and solutions service provider based in China, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Ms. Xiaoyang Huang, Chief Executive Officer of the Company, presented the report outlining the company's achievements and results, showcasing their notable growth and successes in the industry.

data.title: Alvotech to Report Financial Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In Reykjavik, Iceland, on April 24, 2026, Alvotech, a renowned biotechnology company trading under NASDAQ symbols ALVO and ALVO-SDB, disclosed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The release is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the closure of the U.S. market. Specialized in developing and producing biosimilar medications to cater to patients globally, Alvotech continues its commitment to advancing healthcare solutions.

data.title: BTC Digital Ltd. Announces Completion of Georgia Computing Infrastructure Construction and Launches Strategic Transformation into AI Computing Infrastructure Platform
data.description: On April 24, 2026, a digital computing infrastructure company called BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT) shared news about its ongoing project in Georgia, United States. The company disclosed that it is currently working on a 10 MW computing infrastructure initiative.

data.title: New Report on U.S. Health Outcomes (2019-2024)
data.description: A recent report by the Healthy Americas Foundation provides insights into the advancements and possibilities within various demographics in the United States. The Executive Summary: U.S. Health Outcomes (2019–2024) presents a detailed analysis of health trends across the country. Released on April 24, 2026, in Washington, the report offers valuable information on national life expectancy statistics and healthcare improvements during the specified period. This comprehensive overview is crucial for understanding the progression and potential for further enhancements in healthcare outcomes among U.S. populations.

data.title: Allspring Closed-End Funds Declare Monthly Distributions
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina, the Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (EAD), the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (ERC), and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (ERH) declared distributions. The funds with tickers EAD, ERC, and ERH, listed on NYSE American, made the announcements.

data.title: STANDEX ANNOUNCES TIMING OF THIRD QUARTER FISCAL 2026 RESULTS
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct a live Internet broadcast of its conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: Caris Life Sciences to Present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference and the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference
data.description: Caris Life Sciences®, a prominent AI TechBio company focused on precision medicine, is set to present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference and the Goldman Sachs 2026 Health Care Conference. The announcement was made on April 24, 2026, in Irving, Texas. Caris Life Sciences® is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CAI. The company is known for its patient-centric approach and innovative use of artificial intelligence in healthcare.

data.title: American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN) Positioning Itself at Crossroads of Advanced Energy Development, Future Infrastructure
data.description: American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN) revealed its feature in an editorial released by AINewsWire, a part of the Dynamic Brand Portfolio at IBN, which consists of over 75 brands. This platform is dedicated to providing financial news and distributing content for both private and public companies, as well as the investment community. This announcement was made on April 24, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Swarmer Appoints Mykhailo Nestor as Chief Product Officer
data.description: An appointment has been made to aid in the global expansion of a successful autonomous drone software platform that has completed over 100,000 combat missions in Ukraine.

data.title: Liberty Defense Announces Closing of its U.S. Initial Public Offering
data.description: Today, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. concluded its initial public offering in the United States, selling 3,673,638 common shares at $4.50 each. The offering also included pre-funded warrants for 770,807 common shares at a price of $4.4999 per warrant. The gross proceeds amounted to around $20 million, not factoring in discounts and expenses. Additionally, Liberty gave underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 666,666 more common shares to account for over-allotments. Liberty is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol DETX and TSXV as SCAN.

data.title: Pacific Financial Corp Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings of $3.1 Million, or $0.30 per Diluted Share; Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.15 per Share
data.description: A financial holding company, Pacific Financial Corporation (OTCQX: PFLC), based in Aberdeen, Washington, released its first-quarter results for 2026. The company, which owns Bank of the Pacific, announced a net income of $3.1 million, translating to $0.30 per diluted share. This marks a slight decrease from the previous quarter's net income of $3.1 million, or $0.31 per diluted share in the fourth quarter of 2025, and a noticeable increase from the $2.4 million, or $0.24 per diluted share in the first quarter of 2025. The drop in net income compared to the previous quarter is attributed to lower net interest income, alongside recaptured credit losses, reduced non-interest income, and lower non-interest expenses.

data.title: Jushi Holdings Inc. Announces Proposed Continuance from British Columbia to Nevada
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on April 24, 2026, Jushi Holdings Inc. revealed plans to pursue shareholder approval for a proposed arrangement. This arrangement includes transitioning the company from British Columbia, Canada to the State of Nevada in the United States, a move known as the "Continuance." Jushi, a vertically integrated, multi-state cannabis operator, is listed as CSE: JUSH and OTCQX: JUSHF. The company aims to undergo this transition to the new jurisdiction as part of its strategic business direction.

data.title: Endeavor Bancorp Reports Net Income of $1.4 Million for the First Quarter of 2026; Highlighted by Strong Loan and Deposit Growth and NIM Expansion
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Endeavor Bancorp (OTCQX: EDVR) announced its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The company, which owns Endeavor Bank, disclosed a net income of $1.42 million, equivalent to $0.31 per diluted share during this quarter. This figure reflects a decrease from the previous quarter's net income of $1.70 million, or $0.45 per diluted share in the fourth quarter of 2025. In comparison to the first quarter of 2025, where the net income was $1.36 million, or $0.32 per diluted share, there was a slight increase. It is important to note that all financial results presented are unaudited.

data.title: Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (NGTF), d/b/a TechForce Robotics, Launches Live Robot Deployment at IOA Championship (April 24–26) at Morongo Golf Club at Tukwet Canyon
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Nightfood Holdings, Inc. unveiled a new development involving its subsidiary TechForce Robotics. The company introduced its autonomous robots, BIM-E and TIM-E, during a live pilot deployment at the IOA Championship held at Morongo Golf Club at Tukwet Canyon in Beaumont, California. This event, presented by Morongo Casino Resort and Spa, is scheduled from April 24 to April 26, 2026, showcasing the innovative technology to attendees. Nightfood Holdings, Inc. is publicly traded as NGTF on the OTCQB market.

data.title: Gain Therapeutics Announces Oral Presentation at 3rd International GBA1 Meeting 2026
data.description: Gain Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: GANX) based in Bethesda, Maryland, disclosed plans to present at the 3rd International GBA1 Meeting 2026 in Phoenix, Arizona on May 22-23, 2026. The company, a clinical-stage biotech firm specializing in innovative allosteric small molecule therapies, will deliver an oral presentation at the event.

data.title: SVEDA® Introduces its Renewal Peptide Serum: A New Era of Biocompatible, High-Performance Skincare
data.description: A new addition to SVEDA®'s clean skincare range is a high-end peptide serum containing Activated Silk® 33B-α, caviar extract, bakuchiol, and hydrolyzed pearl. This product, launched in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on April 24, 2026, aims to provide clinically-inspired results using natural ingredients.
